summary: Phase 1 complete: All 5 tasks executed. Created Zod schemas for manifest, bundle, and lockfile formats plus atomic writeConfig utility. 29 tests passing.
learnings: ArchConfigSchema is exported from packages/core/src/architecture/types.ts and can be imported within core
Constraint sub-schemas (Layer, ForbiddenImport, Boundary, Security) defined locally as Sharable* variants to avoid cross-package dependency on cli
constraints/index.ts uses named exports, re-export from sharing/ added at end of file
